line_items.description: Raw material: 304SHT (304 Stainless Steel Sheet) (4.5" x 2.0")
Laser Cut (Flat) — 2x Ø.328 THRU holes (zone C4)
Laser Cut (Flat) — 2x obround slots (.328 wide) (zone C3)
Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut with 4x corner radii R.13 TYP (zone C2)
Press Brake — 2x 90° form bend (1.50 leg / 1.00 foot / 3.50 main) (zone B2)
Raw material: 304SHT (4.5" x 2.0")
Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut of 4.5x2.0 blank including 4x R.13 corner radii, 2x Ø.328 through holes, and 2x .328-wide slots (zone C4/C3/C2)
Press Brake — 2x 90° forming bends per note (zone B3)
Raw material: A36PLT (5.75" x 6.0")

Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut of 5.75 x 6.0 plate including R.25 corner radius, upper open slot/notch, lower open slot/notch, and 45° chamfer on lower-left corner — all part of laser profile (zone profile)
Laser Cut (Flat) — Ø.266 THRU hole (item A) (zone C3)
Paint — Paint machine color finish (zone D4)
Raw material: A36PLT (5.75" x 6.0")

Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut including outer perimeter with R.25 corner radii, 45° chamfer on lower-left, Ø.266 THRU hole, and 2 open-ended edge slots/notches — all cut in one laser program (zone C3/C2/B2/C4/B3)
Paint — Paint machine color — finish per drawing note (zone D4)
Raw material: A36PLT (5.75" x 6.0")

Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut including outer perimeter with R.25 corner radius, 45° chamfer at lower-left, 2x open-ended slots on right edge, and Ø.266 THRU hole — all produced in one laser program (zone C3 / C2 / D2 / B3)
Paint — Paint machine color (zone D4)
Raw material: 304SHT (4.5" x 2.0")
Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut of 4.5x2.0 blank incl. 4x R.13 corner radii, 2x Ø.328 THRU holes, and 2x obround slots .328 wide — single laser program (zone C3/C2)
Press Brake — 2x 90° form bends per side profile view, formed height 1.5" (zone B3)
Raw material: _CRS (Cold Rolled Steel) (48.0" x 13.92")
Laser Cut (Flat) — Profile cut including outer profile, 74° angled edge, R.25 outside corner radii, R1 internal radii, and 14x Ø.391 THRU holes — all cut by one laser program (zone C1/C2/B1)
Paint — PAINT MACHINE COLOR finish (zone B4)
